example_scripts.script:
There was a time… when hearing someone's voice… meant everything.
Back then… people waited hours… sometimes days… just for a call.
Not because it was easy… but because it mattered.
And now… They silence calls… from the people who care the most.
Maybe… They didn't lose connection… They just stopped valuing it.

There was a time… when every word carried weight.
Back then… people thought twice… before putting it down.
Not because it was hard… but because it stayed.
And now… They say things instantly… and forget them just as fast.
Maybe… They didn't lose meaning… They just stopped respecting it.

There was a time… when goodbyes felt heavier.
Back then… people waited on platforms… holding on to every moment.
Not because they had time… but because it mattered.
And now… we leave without looking back… as if nothing stays behind.
Maybe… we didn't lose people… we just stopped holding on.

There was a time… when distance didn't mean silence.
Back then… people wrote letters… folded them carefully… and waited.
Not because they had patience… but because someone was worth the wait.
And now… we have instant messages… but nothing to say.
Maybe… we didn't lose words… we just lost the reason to write them.

There was a time… when every photo was a promise.
Back then… people saved their last frame… for something that mattered.
Not because film was expensive… but because moments were.
And now… we take thousands of pictures… and remember none.
Maybe… we didn't lose memories… we just stopped being present for them.
